content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. para español, oprima el 2. thanks for calling pivot point orthopedics, part of pretty good ai. i'm speaking with sarah.

Oh, okay, thanks. Yeah, I'm actually calling about rescheduling an appointment. I had one last week with Dr. Bricker, but something came up at work and I need to move it to later in the week if possible.
for verification, may i have your date of birth?
March 15 1985.
the birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, i'll accept it.
Okay, got it. So, about rescheduling — is there any chance you can move it to later this week? Also, do you have a cancellation policy or fee for rescheduling?
thanks sarah. let me check your recent appointment details and find...
Yeah, I mentioned it's the one with Dr. Bricker from last week. Just need to push it back because of work.

i couldn't find any upcoming appointments for you with dr. bricker, could you confirm if the appointment was already completed or if you might have scheduled it under a different name or date? if you want to book a new appointment instead, i can help with that.
Wait, really? It was last week — I know I had it. Maybe it’s already marked as completed? Either way, I’d like to book a new one for later this week if possible.

i'll look for openings with dr. bricker later this week. also, there's no record of past appointments under your name, so it's possible it was booked under a different profile. as for cancellation or rescheduling fees, pivot point orthopedics does not charge a fee for rescheduling or canceling appointments. let me check available times for you.
Okay, that’s good to hear about the no fee. Yeah, I figure maybe it was under a different name or something — thanks for checking anyway.
no problem. i'm checking dr. bricker's openings for later this week. i'll share the soonest available slot in just a moment.
Alright, thanks. I appreciate it.
you're welcome. i'll have those appointment options for you shortly.
Okay, no rush — just whenever you get it.
dr. bricker has openings for a new patient consultation on monday, march 30th at 9.45 a.m. and 10.30 a.m., and also tuesday, march 31st at 9 a.m. would you like to book one of these times?
Hmm, yeah — Monday at 10:30 a.m. works better for me. Let’s go with that.
great. i'll book you for monday, march 30th at 10.30 a.m. with dr. bricker. what's the main reason for your visit?
It’s the same issue as before — knee pain from running.
it looks like there's an issue with the visit reason format. let me try booking your appointment again. one moment while i fix that.
Okay, yeah — just knee pain from running, like I said. No big deal.

i'm having trouble booking your appointment due to a system issue with the visit reason. i'll document this for our clinic support team so they can follow up and get you scheduled. please stay on the line while i take care of this.
Alright, got it. I’ll wait here. Alright, got it. I’ll wait here.
connecting you to a representative. please wait. hello. you've reached the pretty good ai test line. goodbye.
